sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23234 — Ancients
Constantius II, as Augustus (AD 337-361). AR heavy siliqua (22mm, 3.18 gm, 7h). NGC MS 4/5 - 2/5, brushed, scuff. Sirmium, AD 351-355. D N CONSTAN-TIVS P F AVG, pearl-diademed, draped, and cu
sales.description:
Ancients
Constantius II, as Augustus (AD 337-361). AR heavy siliqua (22mm, 3.18 gm, 7h). NGC MS 4/5 - 2/5, brushed, scuff. Sirmium, AD 351-355. D N CONSTAN-TIVS P F AVG, pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust of Constantius II right, seen from front / VOTIS / XXX / MVLTIS / XXXX, legend in four lines within wreath with elaborate base and terminating in large jewel; SIRM below. RIC VIII 15.

The third son of Constantine the Great, Constantius II was the most successful of Constantine's heir...

sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23243 — Ancients
Valentinian II, Western Roman Empire (AD 375-392). AR siliqua (18mm, 1.63 gm, 7h). NGC XF 5/5 - 4/5. Trier, AD 375-383. D N VALENTINIANVS IVN P F AVG, pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bu
sales.description:
Ancients
Valentinian II, Western Roman Empire (AD 375-392). AR siliqua (18mm, 1.63 gm, 7h). NGC XF 5/5 - 4/5. Trier, AD 375-383. D N VALENTINIANVS IVN P F AVG, pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust of Valentinian II right, seen from front / VICTOR-IA AVGGG, Victory advancing left, wreath in outstretched right hand, palm over shoulder in left; TRPS in exergue. RIC IX 43 and 57a.

Ex Stack's, October 2014 Baltimore Auction (30 October 2014), lot 265; Gussage All Saints Hoard (2010).

As son...
